project_description: Customer service chatbot based on LLM (GPT-4 / Claude). Handling 50 most frequent customer questions (FAQ, order statuses, invoices), integration with CRM and billing systems via API, escalation to human agent, conversation logging, analytics dashboard, fine-tuning on historical transcripts, multilingual support (EN, PL, UA).
client_history: Client has existing customer service center — chatbot to offload 30% of traffic.
risk_patterns: LLM integration with transactional systems — hallucinations critical with financial data.
pm_comment: Guardrails against hallucinations and adversarial tests took 2x longer than planned.
